title: autoreconf
html:
autoreconf

Shell

The shell is invoked multiple times.

echo '/bin/sh 1>&0' >/path/to/temp-file
chmod +x /path/to/temp-file
echo AC_INIT >configure.ac
AUTOM4TE=/path/to/temp-file autoreconf
excerpt: autoreconf Shell The shell is invoked multiple times. echo '/bin/sh 1>&0' >/path/to/temp-file chmod +x /path/to/temp-file echo AC_INIT >configure.ac AUTOM4TE=/path/to/temp-file autoreconf
